alert: A queue backlog is growing and the same failed jobs are retried repeatedly.
root_cause: message queue retry limit too high for poison messages

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:message_queue: Queue logs show poison messages being retried many times.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:message_queue: Queue metrics show elevated retry volume and oldest message age.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:message_queue:RETRY_LIMIT: RETRY_LIMIT is set too high, delaying dead-letter handling.

logs: WARN retry storm detected queue=notifications duplicate_failures=4200

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(message queue retry limit too high for poison messages, lower message queue retry limit)
distractors: Database latency is normal; repeated poison-message retries are consuming queue capacity.
